includeNamespace.description: Whether to include namespace in resource metadata

namespaceOverride.description: Override the namespace. Uses the release namespace when empty.

name.description: Name of the ServiceAccount to use or create

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Disable auto-mounting of the Kubernetes API token

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the ServiceAccount (e.g. for IAM role binding)

minAvailable.description: Minimum number of available pods (integer or percentage)

containerSecurityContext.description: Container-level security context applied to runner and init containers

type.description: preferred: soft constraint; required: hard constraint (pods will not schedule on same node)

affinity.description: Additional affinity rules merged with podAntiAffinity (e.g. nodeAffinity)

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to runner pods (e.g. for Prometheus monitoring)

secret.description: Name of an existing Secret containing key 'ui_token'. When set, runner.token is ignored.

token.description: GitHub Actions runner registration token. Required when runner.secret is not set.

repoUrl.description: GitHub repository or organization URL (e.g. https://github.com/org/repo)

labels.description: Runner labels used for job routing

storageClass.description: StorageClass for the credentials PVC. Defaults to the cluster default.

credStorageSize.description: Storage size for the credentials PVC

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the runner container

initResources.description: Resource requests and limits for the init container

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the DinD container
